reasoning: As of November 2025, Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro is widely considered the leading model on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard, with prediction markets giving it extremely high odds (around 93%) to end the year on top. While DeepSeek has released experimental models (like V3.2-Exp) and may release V4 or R2 by year's end, the competition is extraordinarily fierce, with massive compute disparities favoring US tech giants (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic). Further, DeepSeek's hardware limitations under US sanctions make leapfrogging the state-of-the-art significantly harder for extreme top-end performance. Given that other leading labs (OpenAI with Orion/o3, Anthropic with Claude 4) also possess substantial resources and high baseline performance, the likelihood of a last-minute DeepSeek release capturing and holding the absolute #1 Elo score by December 31 is very low.
batch_queries: Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard current top models DeepSeek ranking
DeepSeek upcoming model release roadmap late 2025
expert predictions top AI model performance end of 2025
OpenAI Orion OR Anthropic Claude 4 OR Google Gemini upcoming release dates 2025
